scenarios.title: Storage Protocol Stack Comparison
scenarios.description: Side-by-side reference for storage protocol stacks: NVMe-oF (TCP, RoCEv2, iWARP, FC), iSCSI/iSER, FCP, SMB3 + SMB Direct (RoCE/iWARP/IB), NFS, S3/HTTP. Aligned 1:1 with OSI and FC layers; click any block for spec-level detail.
